name: Food Processor Pastry
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:05
Position the knife blade in the food processor bowl. Add flour and salt. Process pulsing for 3 or 4 times, or until combined. Add shortening to the flour mixture. Process pulsing for 5 or 6 times, or until the mixture resembles coarse meal. With the processor running, slowly add water (1 tablespoon at a time) until the dough begins to form a ball and leaves sides of the bowl. Cover and chill for 30 minutes. To fit into a pie plate, roll the dough to 1/8-inch thickness on a lightly floured surface. Place in a 9-inch pie plate; trim off excess pastry along edges. Fold the edges under and flute. For baked pastry shell, prick the bottom and sides of the pastry generously with a fork; bake at 425 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes. Yield: pastry for one 9-inch pie.
